7 I 2

Applying to 11101101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 6 = 0
1 I 7 = 1
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 I 0 = 1
6 I 1 = 1
7 I 2 = 1

\boxed{01000111}
